    36	export function TableActionMenuPlugin(): ReactElement | null {

    39	  const [btnPosition, setBtnPosition] = useState<{
    40	    top: number
    41	    left: number
    42	  } | null>(null)
    43	  const cellDOMRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null)
    44	
    45	  // Recompute position from stored DOM ref
    46	  const updatePositionFromDOM = useCallback(() => {
    47	    const cellDOM = cellDOMRef.current
    48	    if (!cellDOM) {
    49	      setBtnPosition(null)
    50	      return
    51	    }
    52	    const rect = cellDOM.getBoundingClientRect()
    53	    setBtnPosition({

    55	      left: rect.right - 26,
    56	    })
    57	  }, [])
    58	
    59	  useEffect(() => {
    60	    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    61	      editorState.read(() => {
    62	        const selection = $getSelection()
    63	        if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
    64	          const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
    65	          const cellNode = $getTableCellNodeFromLexicalNode(anchorNode)
    66	          if (cellNode) {
    67	            const key = cellNode.getKey()
    68	            setCellNodeKey(key)
    69	            const cellDOM = editor.getElementByKey(key)
    70	            cellDOMRef.current = cellDOM

    16	
    17	export interface SlashMenuPluginProps {
    18	  items?: SlashMenuItem[]
    19	  extraItems?: SlashMenuItem[]

    24	  title: string
    25	  icon?: ReactNode

    30	}
    31	
    32	function collectNodeSlashItems(editor: LexicalEditor): SlashMenuItem[] {
    33	  const items: SlashMenuItem[] = []
    34	  const nodes: Map<string, { klass: any }> = (editor as any)._nodes
    35	  for (const { klass } of nodes.values()) {
    36	    const configs: SlashMenuItemConfig[] | undefined = klass.slashMenuItems
    37	    if (configs) {
    38	      for (const config of configs) {
    39	        items.push(new SlashMenuItemClass(config.title, config))
    40	      }
    41	    }
    42	  }
    43	  return items
    44	}
    45	
    46	function filterItems(query: string, items: SlashMenuItem[]): SlashMenuItem[] {
    47	  if (!query) return items
    48	  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
    49	  return items.filter((item) => {
    50	    if (item.title.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return true
    51	    return item.keywords.some((kw) => kw.toLowerCase().includes(lower))
    52	  })
    53	}
    54	
    55	export function SlashMenuPlugin({
    56	  items,
    57	  extraItems,
    58	  triggerChar = '/',
    59	}: SlashMenuPluginProps) {
    60	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    61	  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)
    62	
    63	  const allItems = useMemo(() => {
    64	    if (items) return items
    65	    const builtins = getBuiltinItems()
    66	    const nodeItems = collectNodeSlashItems(editor)
    67	    const combined = [...builtins, ...nodeItems]
    68	    return extraItems ? [...combined, ...extraItems] : combined
    69	  }, [items, extraItems, editor])
    70	
    71	  const filteredItems = useMemo(
    72	    () => filterItems(queryString ?? '', allItems),
    73	    [queryString, allItems],
    74	  )
    75	
    76	  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch(triggerChar, {
    77	    minLength: 0,
    78	  })
    79	
    80	  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
    81	    (
    82	      option: SlashMenuItem,
    83	      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
    84	      closeMenu: () => void,
    85	      matchingString: string,
    86	    ) => {
    87	      editor.update(() => {
    88	        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
    89	          const selection = $getSelection()
    90	          if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
    91	            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
    92	          }
    93	        }
    94	      })
    95	      closeMenu()
    96	      option.onSelect(editor, matchingString)
    97	    },
    98	    [editor],
    99	  )
   100	
   101	  return (
   102	    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<SlashMenuItem>
   103	      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
   104	      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
   105	      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
   106	      options={filteredItems}
   107	      menuRenderFn={(
   108	        anchorElementRef,
   109	        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
   110	      ) => {
   111	        if (!anchorElementRef.current || filteredItems.length === 0) {
   112	          return null
   113	        }
   114	        return createPortal(
   115	          <SlashMenuList
   116	            options={filteredItems}
   117	            selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
   118	            selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
   119	            setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
   120	          />,
   121	          anchorElementRef.current,
   122	        )
   123	      }}
   124	    />
   125	  )

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 14:39:48Z)**_

**Findings (highest severity first)**

1. **High: resize listeners can leak and leave the editor stuck in resize mode**  
   `packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:164` and `packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:165` attach global `pointermove`/`pointerup`, but cleanup/state reset happens only on `pointerup` (`packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:130`, `packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:132`).  
   If `pointerup` is missed (pointer canceled / release outside window), stale listeners remain and `resizing` can stay `true` indefinitely.

2. **Medium: row/column handles can desync from the table while scrolling/resizing**  
   Handle position is updated only from `mousemove` (`packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin.tsx:131`). There is no scroll/resize re-position effect in this plugin, unlike `TableActionMenuPlugin` (`packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableActionMenuPlugin.tsx:93`).  
   Result: handles can appear at stale coordinates until the next mouse move.

3. **Medium: widened 8px resizer hit area now steals interaction inside the cell edge**  
   The handle is centered on the border (`packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:54`, `packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:58`) with `width/height: 8` (`packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:181`, `packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableCellResizerPlugin.tsx:197`), so ~4px sits inside the cell.  
   Since the handle is still interactive when visually hidden (`packages/rich-plugin-table/src/styles.css.ts:39` has no `pointerEvents: none`), users can accidentally trigger resize or lose caret placement near borders.

4. **Low: row/column handles can render off-screen near viewport edges**  
   Positions use fixed negative offsets without clamping (`packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin.tsx:156`, `packages/rich-plugin-table/src/TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin.tsx:164`).  
   Tables close to top/left viewport edges can make handles partially inaccessible.

**Checks run**

1. `pnpm -C packages/rich-plugin-table exec tsc --noEmit` passed.  
2. `pnpm -C packages/rich-editor-shiro exec tsc --noEmit` failed due pre-existing unrelated type errors in `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts` and `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`.
